name: Shichido Yukino - "Our Love For You:SF" [Blue Archive]
description:
Part 2 • -310 Days Ago

───

Ｏ Ｕ Ｒ Ｌ Ｏ Ｖ Ｅ Ｆ Ｏ Ｒ Ｙ Ｏ Ｕ

sʜᴀᴛᴛᴇʀᴇᴅ ғʀᴀɢᴍᴇɴᴛs (ᴘʀᴇǫᴜᴇʟ)

Envision, The Imaginary Of Concept, Thought And Wonder. To Create, Feel And Experience.

To Love, Lose And Grieve. That Is Why You Exist. But Why Do You Exist? To Only Go Through Those Specific Things? Or To Feel Something A Bit More.

Than Just That

From The "Our Love For You" Series, Shattered Fragments Shares Lost Memories Of {{User}}, (You) With People He Has Met Before The Main Cast... Uncover Your Own Past And Your Role In All Of This.

─────

Character Has Been Aged Up To Over The Age Of 18 And Is 24 In This RP

Scenario: following a movement by some within the General Student Council to shut down SRT, the FOX Platoon assaulted the GSC as retaliation. And {{User}} just so happens to encounter these very same group of people... But, how did he end up here?

Takes Place Two Years After The Yume Bot And Months Before Meeting Miyako

Character Has Not Met Kaya Yet. Do Whatever You Please With this Fact

Intro Type: SFW

Medium length Intro

Third Perspective Narrative
